# Raisedash

> The driver readiness platform for modern fleets. Ready before day one. Proven long after.

Raisedash helps U.S. trucking fleets prepare new drivers before day one and keep a clear record of every training step. Drivers open an SMS or email invitation in their phone browser and use a one-time code instead of downloading an app or remembering a password. Fleet teams create fleet-specific training and videos, run AI roleplay practice, turn software walkthroughs into interactive simulations, track progress, and download a training report. The product is for safety directors, operations leaders, and owners at fleets that hire regularly.

## Platform

- [Driver onboarding](https://www.raisedash.com/solutions/driver-onboarding): The commercial overview of Raisedash truck driver onboarding software, including current capabilities and product boundaries.
- [Pre-arrival readiness](https://www.raisedash.com/platform/pre-arrival-readiness): Send orientation and training before the driver arrives, then see what is not started, in progress, or complete.
- [Training evidence](https://www.raisedash.com/platform/training-evidence): Download a report with assigned training, completion details, quiz attempts and scores, recorded activity, and available certificates. Policy signatures, road-test evidence, and complete version-locked evidence packets are not available today.
- [Driver experience](https://www.raisedash.com/platform/driver-experience): A phone-browser experience reached by SMS or email, with a one-time access code and no app download.

## Get a demo

- [Book a demo](https://www.raisedash.com/demo): See how a fleet invites a driver, tracks assigned training, and reviews the training record.

## Resources

- [Blog](https://www.raisedash.com/blog): Practical guides for driver onboarding, orientation, training records, and fleet safety.
- [Truck driver orientation checklist](https://www.raisedash.com/blog/truck-driver-orientation-checklist): A phase-by-phase checklist for pre-arrival work, in-person orientation, first dispatch, and follow-up.
- [Driver training record template](https://www.raisedash.com/blog/driver-training-record-template): A downloadable CSV template and field guide for driver training records.
- [Product Updates](https://www.raisedash.com/product-updates): Latest features and improvements.

## Company

- [About](https://www.raisedash.com/about): Our mission, vision, and the team behind Raisedash.
- [Careers](https://www.raisedash.com/careers): Job opportunities at Raisedash.
- [Contact](https://www.raisedash.com/contact): Get in touch with sales and support teams.

## More products (separate driver tools)

- [Raisedash Academy](https://academy.raisedash.com): Phone-first courses for individual drivers and small carriers.
- [TruckTalk ELP Practice](https://www.raisedash.com/tools/elp-practice): Roadside English-language practice with AI voice roleplay scenarios.
